_doc: Which TIER of the layered level badge the player sees, by Level. The badge is composited from cut parts in games/grove/assets/ui/lvl_parts/ (see Kit.level_badge); a tier decomposes group=tier/6, stage=tier%6+1. The Level->tier map is BANDED so it advances fast early and slows down: walk `bands` in order, each contributes `tiers` consecutive tier indices that each span `levels_per_tier` levels. Past the last band the tier holds at tier_count-1. The legacy single-band form (top-level levels_per_tier, no bands) is still honoured. Banding: L1-10 one tier per level, L11-40 every 3 levels, L41-100 every 6 levels = 30 tiers.
